creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
There is at least one port (net/samba-libsmbclient) that defines an empty CONFLICTS, this causes pkgng to match all installed ports as conflicting.

Fix: 

Either define the CONFLICTS=samba3[2356]-libsmbclient-3.* and/or fix the pkgng conflicts checking code [1].

[1] I assume this is a pkgng specific bug otherwise tinderbox would have picked this up and someone(tm) would have fixed it.
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient
# make -n check-install-conflicts
conflicts_with=$(  /usr/local/sbin/pkg query -g "%n-%v %p %o"    | while read pkgname prfx orgn; do  if [ "//usr/local" = "/${prfx}" -a "/net/samba-libsmbclient" != "/${orgn}" ]; then  echo -n " ${pkgname}";  fi;  done);  if [ -n "${conflicts_with}" ]; then  echo;  echo "===>  samba34-libsmbclient-3.4.17 conflicts with installed package(s): ";  for entry in ${conflicts_with}; do  echo "      ${found}";  done;  echo;  echo "      They install files into the same place.";  echo "      Please remove them first with pkg_delete(1).";  exit 1;  fi
# make check-install-conflicts

===>  samba34-libsmbclient-3.4.17 conflicts with installed package(s):
<snip reason="many blank lines ~867"/>
      They install files into the same place.
      Please remove them first with pkg_delete(1).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient.
# grep CONFLICTS Makefile
CONFLICTS=
